---
name: Canvas Submission
about: Submit repo for a grade!
title: Submission Guidelines
labels: documentation
assignees: emilyynguyen

---

Repo should include:
- README.md file with the link to your hosted GitHub Pages site, found at <username>.github.io/sp26-cse110-lab3 (make sure your site link works)
- Standup notes template in standup.md
- Relevant HTML (from Lab 2) and CSS files (from Lab 3)
- Screenshot of CSS validation.
